scenes.action: Detective Kenji and Informant Zara meet in a crowded alleyway

dialogue.speaker: Informant Zara
dialogue.line: I've got evidence of Oni-Kiru Corp's involvement in the recent synthetic organ black market, but I need protection
dialogue.visual_cue: Zara hands Kenji a data chip as a group of shady figures lurk in the shadows, eyeing them from across the alley

dialogue.speaker: Detective Kenji
dialogue.line: I'll get you into witness protection, but first I need to analyze this data, let's get out of here before things get messy
dialogue.visual_cue: Kenji swiftly glances around, noticing the figures closing in, as neon signs reflect off the wet pavement

scenes.action: Kenji and his AI assistant, Ada, analyze the data

dialogue.speaker: Ada
dialogue.line: The encryption on this data is top-notch, but I've managed to crack it, revealing a web of corruption that goes all the way to the top of Oni-Kiru Corp
dialogue.visual_cue: Ada's holographic display flickers to life, casting a blue glow on Kenji's face as he leans in, eyes widening

dialogue.speaker: Detective Kenji
dialogue.line: Get me everything you can on their CEO, Ryota Nakamura, I want to know his secrets, his motivations, his entire digital footprint
dialogue.visual_cue: Kenji paces around the room, his footsteps echoing off the metallic walls as Ada's display begins to scroll through lines of code

dialogue.speaker: Ada
dialogue.line: Already on it, Kenji, but we're not the only ones looking for this information, I'm detecting some suspicious activity on the darknet
dialogue.visual_cue: The lab's main screen flashes a warning, as Kenji's eyes lock onto the display, his jaw clenched in concern

dialogue.speaker: CEO Ryota Nakamura
dialogue.line: You're just a foolish detective, Kenji, you'll never take me down, I have the entire corporation at my fingertips
dialogue.visual_cue: Nakamura stands behind his massive, sleek desk, a cityscape stretching out behind him through the floor-to-ceiling windows

dialogue.speaker: Detective Kenji
dialogue.line: We have evidence, Nakamura, and witnesses, Zara here is willing to testify against you, it's over
dialogue.visual_cue: Kenji steps forward, his eyes locked on Nakamura, as Zara stands tall beside him, a look of determination on her face

dialogue.speaker: Informant Zara
dialogue.line: You used me, Ryota, you used all of us, but it ends now, justice will be served
dialogue.visual_cue: Zara's voice echoes through the office, as the camera pans out, showing the towering skyscrapers of Neo-Tokyo, a symbol of the corrupt system they're fighting against
